introComposerConfig.ghostText: Say something about yourself, ask a question, or share a recommendation...
introComposerConfig.title: 👋 Adam, say hello to your neighbors

buildingGroupIntroComposerConfig.ghostText: Introduce yourself and share how long you've lived here or something you'd love to talk to other residents about...
buildingGroupIntroComposerConfig.title: Say hello to your fellow residents 👋

templates.text: If you haven't tried [business name] yet, you're missing out. Their [specific item/service] is [why it's great]. [Insert a tip neighbors should know.]
Shoutout to [business name] on [street/area] — [specific reason they're great]. Ask for [person/item] when you go.
Best kept secret in [neighborhood]: [business name]. Go on [day/time] to avoid the crowd and get [specific thing].

spans.text: to avoid the crowd and get

templates.text: [Business name] just started offering [new product/service] and it's [reaction]. Went [last week/recently] and [what happened].
Hidden gem alert: [business name] has been [doing something] for [x years] and most people don't know about it. It’s worth checking them out!

spans.text: and most people don't know about it. It’s worth checking them out!

templates.text: Looking for [age]-year-old playdate buddies for my kid. We're usually free [days/times] and love [activities]. Comment below if this seems like a good fit!

spans.text: -year-old playdate buddies for my kid. We're usually free
. Comment below if this seems like a good fit!

templates.text: Heads up parents: [hazard/issue/thing to know] near [location]. Saw it [when] — wanted to flag for anyone with kids in the area.

spans.text: — wanted to flag for anyone with kids in the area.

templates.text: Any recommendations for [kids activity/class/camp] in the area for a [age]-year-old who's into [interest]? Tried [x] but looking for more options.

My [age]-year-old is looking for ways to earn some money this [summer/season/year]. They're available for [lawn mowing/babysitting/pet sitting/etc.] in the [neighborhood/street] area. Reliable kid — comment if you're interested!

spans.text: -year-old is looking for ways to earn some money this
area. Reliable kid — comment if you're interested!

templates.text: [School/program] near [neighborhood] just opened registration for [thing]. Deadline is [date] — sharing in case other parents missed it.

spans.text: — sharing in case other parents missed it.

templates.text: Heads up neighbors — [event name] is happening at [location] on [date] at [time]. Worth checking out if you're into [type of thing].

spans.text: . Worth checking out if you're into

templates.text: Anyone going to [event] this [weekend/week]? Would love to meet up with neighbors there.

spans.text: ? Would love to meet up with neighbors there.

templates.text: Reminder: [event] is coming up on [date]. Last year [something notable about it] — don't miss it.
I've been going to [event] for [# years] years. This year it's at [location] — here's what to know: [tip].
Looking for people to join me at [event] on [date]. [1 sentence about what it is]. Comment or DM if interested!

spans.text: Looking for people to join me at

templates.text: Saw a neighbor [helping another neighbor with something specific] today on [street]. Small moment but it reminded me why I love living here.

spans.text: . Small moment but it reminded me why I love living here.

templates.text: Thank you to whoever [did the kind thing] on [street/area] — you made my [day/week]!
Just wanted to shout out [neighbor name/description] who [specific kind act] during [situation]. This neighborhood is lucky to have people like that.

spans.text: . This neighborhood is lucky to have people like that.

templates.text: Someone [kind act] for my [family member/pet/property] and I have no idea who it was. Please come forward so I can thank you!

spans.text: and I have no idea who it was. Please come forward so I can thank you!

templates.text: If [description] is your neighbor, consider yourself lucky. They've [specific act] for [me/multiple neighbors] more times than I can count.

spans.text: is your neighbor, consider yourself lucky. They've
more times than I can count.

templates.text: Noticed [positive observation about neighborhood] lately. Hard to put into words but it feels like [neighborhood name] is [heading in a good direction/coming together/etc.].

spans.text: lately. Hard to put into words but it feels like

templates.text: [Positive change in neighborhood] finally happened. Small thing to some, big deal to those of us who [have been waiting/live nearby/use it daily].

spans.text: finally happened. Small thing to some, big deal to those of us who

templates.text: [Something that was broken/missing/a problem] got fixed. Shoutout to whoever made that happen.

spans.text: got fixed. Shoutout to whoever made that happen.

templates.text: The [park/street/corner/spot] on [location] looks so much better after [what changed]. Little things like this add up.

spans.text: . Little things like this add up.

templates.text: [Business/organization in neighborhood] just [good news]. Worth celebrating — they're a staple of this community.

spans.text: . Worth celebrating — they're a staple of this community.

templates.text: Anyone else in [neighborhood] into [hobby/interest]? Would love to connect or maybe start a [group/meetup]. Comment if interested!

templates.text: Looking for a [tennis/running/book club/etc.] partner in [neighborhood]. I [skill level/how often] — comment if interested!
I run a casual [activity] group that meets [when/where]. All levels welcome — drop a comment if you want to join.

spans.text: . All levels welcome — drop a comment if you want to join.

templates.text: New to the neighborhood and looking for fellow [interest] people. Back in [previous place] I had a whole crew — hoping to find the same here.

I had a whole crew — hoping to find the same here.

templates.text: My kid is into [activity] and I'm hoping to find other [age group] nearby to [practice/play/do the thing with]. Comment if interested!

templates.text: The [flowers/trees/plants] on [street/trail/park] are [blooming/changing/etc.] right now. Perfect time to [walk/visit] if you haven't.
Just spotted [animal/plant/natural thing] near [location]. [Any relevant details — safe, rare, seasonal, etc.].

templates.text: Heads up: [nature hazard — bees, poison ivy, etc.] near [location]. Saw it [when] — worth avoiding if you're [walking/hiking/etc.] there.

Spotted this [plant/animal/natural sight] near [location] and had to share. [One sentence about what made it special — in bloom, rare sighting, etc.]. Moments like this remind me why I love living in [neighborhood name].

templates.text: Quick nature update for [neighborhood]: [seasonal observation]. Happens every [time of year] but it never gets old.
Caught this [photo/video] of [subject] near [location] [today/this week]. [One sentence reaction].
[Neighborhood name] in [season] is something else. Took this [on my walk/from my yard/while driving] near [location].
Been [painting/photographing/filming] in the neighborhood and wanted to share. This is [location/subject].

spans.text: in the neighborhood and wanted to share. This is

templates.text: Not sure if anyone else noticed but [subject] near [location] is [beautiful/interesting/wild] right now. Worth a detour.

spans.text: Not sure if anyone else noticed but

templates.text: Local [artist/photographer] here — been documenting [neighborhood name] for [x years]. Here's a recent one: [attach]. Happy to share more if neighbors are interested.

spans.text: . Happy to share more if neighbors are interested.

templates.text: My favorite spot in [neighborhood] that nobody talks about: [place name]. Best time to go is [time/day/season] because [reason].
I've lived here [x years] and only recently discovered [place]. It's [description] — perfect for [activity/occasion].
If you want [experience/thing], skip [obvious option] and go to [hidden gem] instead. [Reason why it's better].
Moved here from [other place] and couldn't believe [neighborhood] had [place name]. It rivals [well-known comparison].
[Place name] on [street/area] is seriously underrated. It's [what it is] and [why it's special]. Go before everyone finds out.
Shoutout to [team name] for [win/achievement] this [weekend/season]. They have been working hard — go [team name]!

templates.text: [Team name] has games every [day] at [location]. Come out and cheer — they could use the support.

templates.text: Looking for players for our [sport] team/league. We play [how often] at [location]. [Skill level] welcome — comment to join.
[Team name] made it to [tournament/playoffs/championship]. Game is [date] at [location] — let's pack the stands.
Starting a [sport] pickup game at [location] on [day/time]. All ages/levels. Show up or comment to be added to the group chat.

spans.text: . All ages/levels. Show up or comment to be added to the group chat.

templates.text: What's the best spot in [neighborhood] to take a [dog/cat/pet type]? [Pet name] is tired of our usual route near [location] and we're looking for new adventures.

and we're looking for new adventures.

coachmarkDescription.text: Comments that may break the guidelines are hidden. Select filtered comments to see all comments.
